positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical emblem featuring a majestic celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) intertwined with geometric lunar phases and glowing crystalline flora. The composition must be centered and designed as a repeating pattern or single powerful graphic. Use a modern Art Deco/Neo-Mystic style with strong, clean silhouettes and crisp linework. The color palette should be restricted to deep midnight indigo, electric cyan, gold leaf accents, and hints of ethereal lavender. The lighting must be dramatic, utilizing deep shadows and sharp rim lighting to maximize contrast for apparel printing. Vector art quality, hyper-detailed graphic design, perfect composition for a T-shirt print.
